{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Civil Engineer (Piling & Deep-Water Operations)",
  "description": "Pyfinest Resources - Our client, a leading specialist contractor in Piling, Deep Foundations, and Marine Construction, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Civil Engineer (Piling &amp; Deep-Water Operations)

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Piling, Deep Foundations &amp; Marine Construction

Job Summary


	They are seeking an experienced Senior Civil Engineer to supervise the execution of complex piling projects across onshore and offshore environments.
	This role is for professionals with deep understanding of HOW success in piling is achieved through technical precision, operational discipline, and uncompromising quality control.


Your Core Responsibilities
Site Supervision &amp; Execution:


	Supervise daily piling operations to ensure compliance with approved engineering specifications
	Coordinate site teams, operators, subcontractors, and equipment resources
	Monitor productivity and ensure projects remain on schedule
	Ensure efficient deployment of piling rigs, cranes, barges, and support equipment


Marine &amp; Deep-Water Piling:


	Supervise piling activities executed from barges, pontoons, and marine platforms
	Coordinate marine equipment and personnel during offshore piling operations
	Monitor pile positioning, alignment, penetration depths, and installation tolerances
	Ensure strict adherence to marine safety and operational procedures


Quality Assurance &amp; Technical Control:


	Review drawings, method statements, and construction procedures
	Verify pile integrity, reinforcement placement, and concrete quality
	Maintain QA/QC documentation and inspection records
	Identify and resolve technical issues before they impact project delivery


HSE Leadership:


	Enforce company HSE standards and industry best practices
	Conduct toolbox talks and site safety inspections
	Ensure compliance with all statutory and client safety requirements


The Ideal Candidate
Mandatory Requirements:


	B.Eng / B.Tech in Civil Engineering
	Minimum 8&ndash;12 years of progressive construction experience
	Minimum 5 years direct experience supervising piling operations
	COREN Registration
	Proven experience in marine/deep-water piling projects
	Strong understanding of:
	
		Bored Piles
		CFA Piles
		Rotary Piles
		Driven Piles
		Sheet Piles
		Deep Foundation Systems
	
	
	Ability to interpret engineering drawings and specifications
	Strong knowledge of QA/QC and HSE procedures
	The ideal candidate must possess extensive hands-on experience supervising:
	
		Bored Piling Operations
		CFA Piling Operations
		Rotary Piling Operations
		Driven Piling Operations
		Sheet Piling Operations
		Marine &amp; Deep-Water Piling Works.
	
	


What Makes This Role Attractive


	Salary: N600,000 monthly.
	Opportunity to work on landmark infrastructure projects
	Exposure to large-scale marine and offshore construction operations
	Highly Competitive Salary
	Logistics Support
	Career Growth Opportunities
	Professional and Technically Driven Work Environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their updated CV and Project Portfolio highlighting piling projects supervised to: pyfinest.hr@gmail.com with &ldquo;Senior Civil Engineer &ndash; Piling Operations&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates with verifiable large-scale piling leadership experience will be contacted.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-18",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Pyfinest Resources"
    
  },

Senior Civil Engineer (Piling & Deep-Water Operations) Job at Pyfinest Resources




        
    

        
        Pyfinest Resources - Our client, a leading specialist contractor in Piling, Deep Foundations, and Marine Construction, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Civil Engineer (Piling & Deep-Water Operations)

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Piling, Deep Foundations & Marine Construction

Job Summary
     

            
    




	They are seeking an experienced Senior Civil Engineer to supervise the execution of complex piling projects across onshore and offshore environments.
	This role is for professionals with deep understanding of HOW success in piling is achieved through technical precision, operational discipline, and uncompromising quality control.


Your Core Responsibilities
Site Supervision & Execution:


	Supervise daily piling operations to ensure compliance with approved engineering specifications
	Coordinate site teams, operators, subcontractors, and equipment resources
	Monitor productivity and ensure projects remain on schedule
	Ensure efficient deployment of piling rigs, cranes, barges, and support equipment


Marine & Deep-Water Piling:


	Supervise piling activities executed from barges, pontoons, and marine platforms
	Coordinate marine equipment and personnel during offshore piling operations
	Monitor pile positioning, alignment, penetration depths, and installation tolerances
	Ensure strict adherence to marine safety and operational procedures


Quality Assurance & Technical Control:


	Review drawings, method statements, and construction procedures
	Verify pile integrity, reinforcement placement, and concrete quality
	Maintain QA/QC documentation and inspection records
	Identify and resolve technical issues before they impact project delivery


HSE Leadership:


	Enforce company HSE standards and industry best practices
	Conduct toolbox talks and site safety inspections
	Ensure compliance with all statutory and client safety requirements


The Ideal Candidate
Mandatory Requirements:


	B.Eng / B.Tech in Civil Engineering
	Minimum 8–12 years of progressive construction experience
	Minimum 5 years direct experience supervising piling operations
	COREN Registration
	Proven experience in marine/deep-water piling projects
	Strong understanding of:
	
		Bored Piles
		CFA Piles
		Rotary Piles
		Driven Piles
		Sheet Piles
		Deep Foundation Systems
	
	
	Ability to interpret engineering drawings and specifications
	Strong knowledge of QA/QC and HSE procedures
	The ideal candidate must possess extensive hands-on experience supervising:
	
		Bored Piling Operations
		CFA Piling Operations
		Rotary Piling Operations
		Driven Piling Operations
		Sheet Piling Operations
		Marine & Deep-Water Piling Works.
	
	


What Makes This Role Attractive


	Salary: N600,000 monthly.
	Opportunity to work on landmark infrastructure projects
	Exposure to large-scale marine and offshore construction operations
	Highly Competitive Salary
	Logistics Support
	Career Growth Opportunities
	Professional and Technically Driven Work Environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their updated CV and Project Portfolio highlighting piling projects supervised to: [email protected] with “Senior Civil Engineer – Piling Operations” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates with verifiable large-scale piling leadership experience will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Infrastructure Engineer",
  "description": "Dutum Company Limited was incorporated under the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria in 1999, with registration number: RC 140577. Dutum is a world class engineering and construction group with a reputation for technical excellence founded on more than 20 years of experience. Dutum has been among the top rated Construction Companies in South West and Central parts of Nigeria. We create and care for essential assets: hospitals, bridges, schools, roads, petrol stations and other major structures. We work in partnership with sophisticated customers who value the highest levels of quality, safety and technical expertise &ndash; applying our skills to meet their individual needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Infrastructure Engineer

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Plan, design, and supervise the execution of infrastructure projects, including roads, drainage, water systems, and other civil works.
	Conduct site assessments, feasibility studies, and technical evaluations.
	Prepare engineering designs, drawings, specifications, cost estimates, and project reports.
	Monitor project progress to ensure compliance with approved designs, quality standards, timelines, and budgets. coordinate with consultants, contractors, regulatory agencies, and other project stakeholders.
	Identify and resolve technical challenges during project execution.
	Ensure adherence to health, safety, environmental, and regulatory requirements.
	Provide technical support and recommendations for infrastructure development and improvement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Civil Engineering or a related engineering discipline.
	Minimum of 6 years of relevant experience in infrastructure engineering projects.
	COREN certification is mandatory.
	Proven experience in the planning, design, execution, and supervision of infrastructure projects.
	Sound knowledge of roadworks, drainage systems, water supply networks, utilities, and other civil infrastructure works.
	Proficiency in engineering design and project management software such as AutoCAD, Civil 3D, Microsoft Project, or similar tools.
	Strong understanding of engineering standards, specifications, and regulatory requirements.
	Excellent analytical, problem-solving, communication, and reporting skills.
	Must be willing to work and reside in Abuja.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@dutumgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Infrastructure Engineer Job at Dutum Company Limited




        
    

        
        Dutum Company Limited was incorporated under the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria in 1999, with registration number: RC 140577. Dutum is a world class engineering and construction group with a reputation for technical excellence founded on more than 20 years of experience. Dutum has been among the top rated Construction Companies in South West and Central parts of Nigeria. We create and care for essential assets: hospitals, bridges, schools, roads, petrol stations and other major structures. We work in partnership with sophisticated customers who value the highest levels of quality, safety and technical expertise – applying our skills to meet their individual needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

            
    



Job Position: Infrastructure Engineer

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Plan, design, and supervise the execution of infrastructure projects, including roads, drainage, water systems, and other civil works.
	Conduct site assessments, feasibility studies, and technical evaluations.
	Prepare engineering designs, drawings, specifications, cost estimates, and project reports.
	Monitor project progress to ensure compliance with approved designs, quality standards, timelines, and budgets. coordinate with consultants, contractors, regulatory agencies, and other project stakeholders.
	Identify and resolve technical challenges during project execution.
	Ensure adherence to health, safety, environmental, and regulatory requirements.
	Provide technical support and recommendations for infrastructure development and improvement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering or a related engineering discipline.
	Minimum of 6 years of relevant experience in infrastructure engineering projects.
	COREN certification is mandatory.
	Proven experience in the planning, design, execution, and supervision of infrastructure projects.
	Sound knowledge of roadworks, drainage systems, water supply networks, utilities, and other civil infrastructure works.
	Proficiency in engineering design and project management software such as AutoCAD, Civil 3D, Microsoft Project, or similar tools.
	Strong understanding of engineering standards, specifications, and regulatory requirements.
	Excellent analytical, problem-solving, communication, and reporting skills.
	Must be willing to work and reside in Abuja.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "At TeKnowledge, we turn complexity into clarity &ndash; and potential into progress. We go beyond problem-solving to transform how you grow. By blending cutting-edge technology with expert insight, we help enterprises, governments and tech vendors tackle their biggest challenges while preparing them for what&rsquo;s next. From strategy to execution, we drive smarter, faster, and more sustained innovation&mdash;empowering organizations with the capability and control to lead with confidence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: DevOps Engineer

Req ID: 2026-17477
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos

Overview


	We are building an AI-Native Engineering team and looking for a DevOps Engineer who will be a key player in our Product Development Outsourcing business.
	Our engineers love to learn and have a passion for technology.
	They&rsquo;re known for their expertise in solving the most complex tech challenges while having fun and being part of a dynamic and collaborative team.
	In this role, you&rsquo;ll join a team creating the financial services and banking industry of tomorrow, helping an innovative fintech company that is committed to transforming the retail space in Africa, you&rsquo;ll help increase the speed of delivery and enhance the overall developer experience for our clients.


Responsibilities


	Work closely with developers and the architect to evaluate existing problems and offer process improvement solutions.
	Identify bottlenecks in the coding development and implementation process.
	Participate in the planning of the delivery time, the quality of the code, and the improvement of the efficiency of the process.
	Execute the plan by creating coding standards and automating processes for the organization.
	Perform daily tasks such as setting up development and production environments, monitoring metrics, and reporting incidents.
	Develop and maintain knowledge of platform configuration management and troubleshooting.
	Actively participate in the deployment of application devices in appropriate environments through compatible technologies and infrastructures.
	Coordinate with developers and technical members of the organization to understand their main weaknesses in the coding and development process.
	Collaborate with the team to provide coherent and holistic solutions.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s degree or equivalent degree in computer science or another related field.
	3-4 years of coding and scripting experience in implementing large-scale cloud architectures using modern cloud-based container platforms is highly desirable.
	Knowledge of the implementation of automatic infrastructure provisioning solutions is a big advantage (i.e. Puppet, Chef, Ansible).
	Knowledge of Linux OS, SQL, PL SQL, Scripting, and Container is required.
	Knowledge of networks, cloud infrastructure, and management tools for computing components, storage, networking, caching, etc. is a plus.
	Deep understanding of the Agile methodology.
	Experience as a DevOps or SRE Engineer in an agile multifunctional team is preferred.
	Ability to collaborate and create efficient and innovative solutions.
	Strong analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills.
	Passion for emerging technologies and their impact.
	Open to new ideas and eager to learn and gain new skills.
	A self-starter who thrives in a culture built around transparency and trust.
	Professional fluency in English is vital,both written and spoken.
	Must have completed the compulsory 1-year NYSC or have an exemption certificate.
	A valid and up to date National Identity Card/NIMC slip is required upon commencement of this role.

DevOps Engineer Job at TeKnowledge




        
    

        
        At TeKnowledge, we turn complexity into clarity – and potential into progress. We go beyond problem-solving to transform how you grow. By blending cutting-edge technology with expert insight, we help enterprises, governments and tech vendors tackle their biggest challenges while preparing them for what’s next. From strategy to execution, we drive smarter, faster, and more sustained innovation—empowering organizations with the capability and control to lead with confidence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: DevOps Engineer

Req ID: 2026-17477
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos

Overview
     

            
    




	We are building an AI-Native Engineering team and looking for a DevOps Engineer who will be a key player in our Product Development Outsourcing business.
	Our engineers love to learn and have a passion for technology.
	They’re known for their expertise in solving the most complex tech challenges while having fun and being part of a dynamic and collaborative team.
	In this role, you’ll join a team creating the financial services and banking industry of tomorrow, helping an innovative fintech company that is committed to transforming the retail space in Africa, you’ll help increase the speed of delivery and enhance the overall developer experience for our clients.


Responsibilities


	Work closely with developers and the architect to evaluate existing problems and offer process improvement solutions.
	Identify bottlenecks in the coding development and implementation process.
	Participate in the planning of the delivery time, the quality of the code, and the improvement of the efficiency of the process.
	Execute the plan by creating coding standards and automating processes for the organization.
	Perform daily tasks such as setting up development and production environments, monitoring metrics, and reporting incidents.
	Develop and maintain knowledge of platform configuration management and troubleshooting.
	Actively participate in the deployment of application devices in appropriate environments through compatible technologies and infrastructures.
	Coordinate with developers and technical members of the organization to understand their main weaknesses in the coding and development process.
	Collaborate with the team to provide coherent and holistic solutions.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree or equivalent degree in computer science or another related field.
	3-4 years of coding and scripting experience in implementing large-scale cloud architectures using modern cloud-based container platforms is highly desirable.
	Knowledge of the implementation of automatic infrastructure provisioning solutions is a big advantage (i.e. Puppet, Chef, Ansible).
	Knowledge of Linux OS, SQL, PL SQL, Scripting, and Container is required.
	Knowledge of networks, cloud infrastructure, and management tools for computing components, storage, networking, caching, etc. is a plus.
	Deep understanding of the Agile methodology.
	Experience as a DevOps or SRE Engineer in an agile multifunctional team is preferred.
	Ability to collaborate and create efficient and innovative solutions.
	Strong analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills.
	Passion for emerging technologies and their impact.
	Open to new ideas and eager to learn and gain new skills.
	A self-starter who thrives in a culture built around transparency and trust.
	Professional fluency in English is vital,both written and spoken.
	Must have completed the compulsory 1-year NYSC or have an exemption certificate.
	A valid and up to date National Identity Card/NIMC slip is required upon commencement of this role.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Branch Manager",
  "description": "At Premium HR Solution, our commitment to excellence extends globally, offering unparalleled coverage to meet the diverse talent needs of organizations around the world. With a robust network spanning continents, we leverage our international reach to connect clients with top-tier professionals, ensuring a truly global approach to talent acquisition and management. Our strategic presence enables us to access, assess, and deliver high-calibre candidates across various industries and geographical locations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager
Job Locations: Lagos Island, Idumota, Apapa, Tincan Island, Idumagbo, Ikoyi, LBS, Moloney, Kofo Abayomi, and Ikeja GRA - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Banking / Financial Services
Grade Level: SBE &ndash; Manager

Job Summary


	The Branch Manager is responsible for the overall leadership, performance, and profitability of the branch.
	The role involves driving business growth, managing branch operations, ensuring excellent customer service delivery, and maintaining compliance with regulatory and internal policies.
	The ideal candidate will demonstrate strong leadership, commercial acumen, and a deep understanding of retail and commercial banking operations.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development &amp; Revenue Growth:


	Drive deposit mobilization and grow the branch&rsquo;s liability and asset portfolio.
	Develop and execute strategies to meet and exceed business targets.
	Identify new market opportunities and expand the customer base across retail and SME segments.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with high-value clients and key stakeholders.


Branch Operations Management:


	Oversee daily branch operations to ensure efficiency and service excellence.
	Ensure adherence to operational policies, procedures, and service standards.
	Monitor branch performance metrics and implement improvement initiatives.


Leadership &amp; People Management:


	Lead, coach, and supervise branch staff to achieve individual and team targets.
	Foster a high-performance culture focused on accountability and results.
	Identify training needs and support staff development and succession planning.


Customer Experience &amp; Service Delivery:


	Ensure exceptional customer service and prompt resolution of customer complaints.
	Drive customer retention and satisfaction initiatives.
	Promote the bank&rsquo;s products and digital channels to enhance customer engagement.


Risk Management &amp; Compliance:


	Ensure strict compliance with regulatory requirements and internal control policies.
	Monitor and mitigate operational, credit, and fraud risks within the branch.
	Ensure proper documentation and adherence to KYC/AML guidelines.


Financial Performance &amp; Reporting:


	Manage the branch&rsquo;s budget, profitability, and cost efficiency.
	Prepare and present periodic performance reports to regional management.
	Track and analyze financial performance indicators to drive decision-making.





Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Deposit growth and asset portfolio performance
	Revenue and profitability targets
	Customer acquisition and retention rates
	Loan book quality (NPL ratio)
	Operational efficiency and compliance metrics
	Staff performance and engagement levels.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or related field.
	8&ndash;12 years of experience in banking, with at least 3&ndash;5 years in a leadership role.
	Strong experience in retail banking, SME banking, or commercial banking.
	Professional certifications (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CIBN) are an added advantage.


Key Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Business development and sales acumen
	Financial analysis and portfolio management
	Customer relationship management
	Risk awareness and compliance orientation
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strategic thinking and problem-solving ability.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-18",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-31",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Premium HR Solution"
    
  },

Branch Manager Job at Premium HR Solution




        
    

        
        At Premium HR Solution, our commitment to excellence extends globally, offering unparalleled coverage to meet the diverse talent needs of organizations around the world. With a robust network spanning continents, we leverage our international reach to connect clients with top-tier professionals, ensuring a truly global approach to talent acquisition and management. Our strategic presence enables us to access, assess, and deliver high-calibre candidates across various industries and geographical locations.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager
Job Locations: Lagos Island, Idumota, Apapa, Tincan Island, Idumagbo, Ikoyi, LBS, Moloney, Kofo Abayomi, and Ikeja GRA - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Banking / Financial Services
Grade Level: SBE – Manager

Job Summary


	The Branch Manager is responsible for the overall leadership, performance, and profitability of the branch.
	The role involves driving business growth, managing branch operations, ensuring excellent customer service delivery, and maintaining compliance with regulatory and internal policies.
	The ideal candidate will demonstrate strong leadership, commercial acumen, and a deep understanding of retail and commercial banking operations.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development & Revenue Growth:


	Drive deposit mobilization and grow the branch’s liability and asset portfolio.
	Develop and execute strategies to meet and exceed business targets.
	Identify new market opportunities and expand the customer base across retail and SME segments.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with high-value clients and key stakeholders.


Branch Operations Management:


	Oversee daily branch operations to ensure efficiency and service excellence.
	Ensure adherence to operational policies, procedures, and service standards.
	Monitor branch performance metrics and implement improvement initiatives.


Leadership & People Management:


	Lead, coach, and supervise branch staff to achieve individual and team targets.
	Foster a high-performance culture focused on accountability and results.
	Identify training needs and support staff development and succession planning.


Customer Experience & Service Delivery:


	Ensure exceptional customer service and prompt resolution of customer complaints.
	Drive customer retention and satisfaction initiatives.
	Promote the bank’s products and digital channels to enhance customer engagement.


Risk Management & Compliance:


	Ensure strict compliance with regulatory requirements and internal control policies.
	Monitor and mitigate operational, credit, and fraud risks within the branch.
	Ensure proper documentation and adherence to KYC/AML guidelines.


Financial Performance & Reporting:


	Manage the branch’s budget, profitability, and cost efficiency.
	Prepare and present periodic performance reports to regional management.
	Track and analyze financial performance indicators to drive decision-making.





Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Deposit growth and asset portfolio performance
	Revenue and profitability targets
	Customer acquisition and retention rates
	Loan book quality (NPL ratio)
	Operational efficiency and compliance metrics
	Staff performance and engagement levels.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or related field.
	8–12 years of experience in banking, with at least 3–5 years in a leadership role.
	Strong experience in retail banking, SME banking, or commercial banking.
	Professional certifications (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CIBN) are an added advantage.


Key Skills & Competencies:


	Strong leadership and team management skills
	Business development and sales acumen
	Financial analysis and portfolio management
	Customer relationship management
	Risk awareness and compliance orientation
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strategic thinking and problem-solving ability.
